name: Soo Jeung Kwa (Persimmon Punch)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb ginger, fresh, rinsed and sliced thin with skin on
6 whole semi-dried persimmons, cut into 1-inch triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil in a large pot with the ginger and cinnamon sticks (8-10). Cook over moderate heat for 30 minutes. Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve and discard the ginger, keeping the cinnamon in the punch.
2. Add the sugar while the liquid is still hot, stirring until it dissolves completely. Add the persimmons to the lukewarm liquid and allow to cool slightly. The color of the punch will deepen to an old rose shade. Refrigerate the punch and serve cold.
3. Serve whenever desired with any Asian food.
Makes 1 gallon.
